# AXAL — robots.txt
# Generated by Jekyll. Sitemap is auto-built by jekyll-sitemap.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Don't crawl authenticated portals or short-lived tokenized pages.
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /quote/?id=

# Don't index the raw configurator bundle or worker probe endpoints.
Disallow: /assets/configurator/bundle.
Disallow: /api/

Sitemap: {{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}
